---
title: "吉田山の里山の会 植樹木マップ"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    css: assets/tree-map.css
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" integrity="sha256-p4NxAoJBhIIN+hmNHrzRCf9tD/miZyoHS5obTRR9BMY=" crossorigin="anonymous">
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js" integrity="sha256-20nQCchB9co0qIjJZRGuk2/Z9VM+kNiyxNV1lvTlZBo=" crossorigin="anonymous" defer></script>
        <script src="assets/tree-map.js" defer></script>
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

site_variant <- tolower(trimws(Sys.getenv(
  "TREE_SITE_VARIANT",
  unset = "public"
)))
if (!site_variant %in% c("public", "cloudflare")) {
  stop("TREE_SITE_VARIANT must be 'public' or 'cloudflare'.")
}

data_file <- Sys.getenv("TREE_DATA_FILE", unset = "")
if (!nzchar(data_file)) {
  stop("TREE_DATA_FILE must point to a CSV file outside the project directory.")
}
data_file <- normalizePath(data_file, mustWork = TRUE)
project_dir <- normalizePath(getwd(), mustWork = TRUE)
project_prefix <- paste0(project_dir, .Platform$file.sep)
if (
  identical(tolower(data_file), tolower(project_dir)) ||
    startsWith(tolower(data_file), tolower(project_prefix))
) {
  stop("TREE_DATA_FILE must be outside the project directory.")
}

trees <- suppressWarnings(utils::read.csv(
  data_file,
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8",
  check.names = FALSE,
  na.strings = c("", "NA")
))

public_columns <- c(
  "record_id", "species_ja", "species_scientific",
  "latitude", "longitude", "publish", "year", "note"
)
required_columns <- public_columns
if (identical(site_variant, "cloudflare")) {
  required_columns <- c(required_columns, "planted_by")
}
missing_columns <- setdiff(required_columns, names(trees))
if (length(missing_columns)) {
  stop("CSVに必要な列がありません: ", paste(missing_columns, collapse = ", "))
}

is_public <- tolower(trimws(as.character(trees$publish))) %in%
  c("true", "1", "yes")
trees <- trees[is_public, required_columns, drop = FALSE]
trees$latitude <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(trees$latitude))
trees$longitude <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(trees$longitude))
trees <- trees[
  is.finite(trees$latitude) & is.finite(trees$longitude),
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

if (!nrow(trees)) {
  stop("公開対象で、有効な緯度・経度を持つ立木データがありません。")
}

output_columns <- setdiff(public_columns, "publish")
if (identical(site_variant, "cloudflare")) {
  output_columns <- c(output_columns, "planted_by")
}
# 個人情報はJSON化の前に明示的な列許可リストで除外する。
trees <- trees[, output_columns, drop = FALSE]

tree_json <- jsonlite::toJSON(
  trees,
  dataframe = "rows",
  auto_unbox = TRUE,
  na = "null",
  digits = NA
)
tree_json <- gsub("</", "<\\/", tree_json, fixed = TRUE)

variant_text <- if (identical(site_variant, "cloudflare")) {
  "認証限定版：植栽者情報を表示します。"
} else {
  "一般公開版：植栽者情報は含まれていません。"
}

planted_by_row <- if (identical(site_variant, "cloudflare")) {
  '<div class="tree-detail-row"><dt>植栽者</dt><dd data-tree-detail="planted-by"></dd></div>\n'
} else {
  ""
}

cat(
  sprintf(
    '<p class="tree-site-variant" data-site-variant="%s">%s</p>\n',
    site_variant,
    variant_text
  ),
  '<div class="tree-map-layout">\n',
  '<div id="tree-map" role="region" ',
  'aria-label="吉田山の立木位置図" ',
  'aria-describedby="tree-map-summary"></div>\n',
  '<section id="tree-detail-panel" class="tree-detail-panel card" ',
  'role="complementary" aria-labelledby="tree-detail-heading">\n',
  '<div class="card-body">\n',
  '<p id="tree-detail-heading" class="tree-detail-heading" role="heading" aria-level="2">立木の詳細</p>\n',
  '<p id="tree-detail-empty" class="tree-detail-empty">地図上のマーカーを選択すると、ここに植栽情報が表示されます。</p>\n',
  '<div id="tree-detail-content" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true" hidden>\n',
  '<p class="tree-detail-name" data-tree-detail="name" role="heading" aria-level="3"></p>\n',
  '<p class="tree-detail-scientific" data-tree-detail="scientific"></p>\n',
  '<dl class="tree-detail-list">\n',
  '<div class="tree-detail-row"><dt>管理ID</dt><dd data-tree-detail="record-id"></dd></div>\n',
  '<div class="tree-detail-row"><dt>植栽年度</dt><dd data-tree-detail="year"></dd></div>\n',
  planted_by_row,
  '<div class="tree-detail-row"><dt>緯度・経度</dt><dd data-tree-detail="coordinates"></dd></div>\n',
  '</dl>\n',
  '<section class="tree-detail-note" aria-labelledby="tree-detail-note-heading">\n',
  '<p id="tree-detail-note-heading" class="tree-detail-note-heading" role="heading" aria-level="4">備考</p>\n',
  '<p data-tree-detail="note"></p>\n',
  '</section>\n',
  '</div>\n',
  '</div>\n',
  '</section>\n',
  '</div>\n',
  sep = ""
)
cat(
  sprintf(
    '<p id="tree-map-summary" class="tree-map-summary">公開対象の立木 %d件を表示しています。マーカーを選択すると詳細パネルが更新されます。</p>\n',
    nrow(trees)
  )
)
cat(
  '<script id="tree-map-data" type="application/json">',
  tree_json,
  '</script>\n',
  sep = ""
)
```
